issues.detail: The instructions do not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases beyond general limitations.
The skill file contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Pricing page generation with v0.dev
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives a vague prompt without real prices and only loosely references shadcn; treatment uses a concrete shadcn-targeted prompt with real tier prices, the documented setup chain (npx create-next-app, npx shadcn@latest init, npx shadcn@latest add card button badge), and notes the no-vendor-lock-in property of v0 output.

scenarios.name: Iterating on a v0 admin dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions iterating in v0 chat but suggests jumping to manual edits and omits the use-client review and limitation list; treatment explicitly says iterate inside the same conversation, follows the documented 5-step iteration pattern, lists v0 strengths vs limitations, and covers use client placement and mock-to-real data replacement.
